message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Customer
participant "Device" as Device
participant "DeviceProvisioningService" as DPS
participant "ProductIoTHub" as IoTHub
participant "FWProvider" as FWProvider

note over Device, FWProvider
  Device was registered for this product before
end note

activate Customer
activate Device

note over Device
  First start
end note

Customer -> Device: 1 Switch On/Power Up
activate Device

note over Device
  Booting up
end note

Device -> DPS: 2 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> Device: 3 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
Device -> IoTHub: 4 setProperties
Device -> DPS: 5 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)

opt [Firmware needs to be updated]
  Device -> DPS: 6 updateFWMandantory(URL)
  Device -> FWProvider: 7 URL.get(OLDFW)
  FWProvider --> Device: 8 FW, Checksum
  note over Device
    Downloading
  end note
  Device -> Device: 9 CheckChecksum
  Device -> Device: 10 update
  note over Device
    Installing
  end note
  Device -> Device: 11 restart
  note over Device
    Booting up
  end note
  Device -> DPS: 12 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)
end opt

DPS --> Device: 13 youMayStartSending()
Device -> IoTHub: 14 sendData(Data)

note over Device
  Working
end note

activate Customer
activate Device

note over Device
  Claim/Remove
end note

Device -> DPS: 15 youMustRetire()
Device -> Device: 16 waits

opt [if Device was not reached]
  Device -> IoTHub: 17 sendData(Data)
  IoTHub --> Device: 18 Not registered
end opt

Device -> DPS: 19 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> Device: 20 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ERROR, null, null)
Device -> Device: 21 NobodyLovesMeMode()

loop [once a day]
  Device -> DPS: 22 registerDevice(callback)
end loop

note over Device
  IoT Hub not available
end note

loop [several times]
  Device -> IoTHub: 23 sendData(Data)
  IoTHub --> Device: 24 NotAvailable/Network Error
end loop

Device -> DPS: 25 registerDevice(callback)
DPS --> Device: 26 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
Device -> Device: 27 compare IoTHub and change if necessary

note over Device, FWProvider
  if connection is now successfull, go on. If not and IoT Hub has not changed
  repeat with low frequency. Also if DPS is not available.
end note

deactivate Customer
deactivate Device
deactivate DPS
deactivate IoTHub
deactivate FWProvider
@enduml
